gist.headline: Shorts in a snap
gist.blurb: The community just dropped kre8.info into the greenhouse. Spin up end-to-end faceless videos and shorts in under 10 minutes with a single prompt.
gist.summary: Added kre8.info to the community showcase, a new tool for generating end-to-end shorts and faceless videos from a single prompt.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover and use kre8.info to rapidly produce video content directly from the community apps directory.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a video creation tool ('kre8.info') that makes shorts/faceless videos. Visual symbols: film reels, clapperboards, video screens. Characters: Polly the bee acting as a movie director.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny movie director's beret, sitting in a small canvas chair next to a glowing retro monitor showing a vertical video short. A chunky pixel clapperboard rests on the ground nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
